summary.en: IEC 62196 covers plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors, and vehicle inlets for conductive EV charging. Colombia projects should verify the vehicle fleet, connector family, public-access expectation, and any IEC 62196 requirement in the tender or operator specification instead of assuming China GB/T connector compatibility.
summary.zh: IEC 62196覆盖电动汽车传导充电用插头、插座、车辆连接器和车辆插座。哥伦比亚项目应核查当地车型、接口族、公共接入预期以及招标或运营方规范中是否要求IEC 62196，而不应假定中国GB/T接口兼容。
summary.zht: IEC 62196覆蓋電動汽車傳導充電用插頭、插座、車輛連接器和車輛插座。哥倫比亞項目應核查當地車型、接口族、公共接入預期以及招標或營運方規範中是否要求IEC 62196，而不應假定中國GB/T接口相容。

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 20234 for EV conductive charging connection devices, including GB/T 20234.1-2023 for general requirements and GB/T 20234.3-2023 for DC charging interfaces. GB/T AC and DC interfaces are separate connector systems from IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2 implementations unless a dual-standard design or adapter is specifically validated.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用 GB/T 20234 作为电动汽车传导充电连接装置基线，包括通用要求 GB/T 20234.1-2023 和直流充电接口 GB/T 20234.3-2023。除非双标准设计或适配器经过专门验证，否则 GB/T 交流和直流接口应视为不同于 IEC 62196 Type 2 或 CCS2 实施的接口系统。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用 GB/T 20234 作為電動汽車傳導充電連接裝置基線，包括通用要求 GB/T 20234.1-2023 和直流充電接口 GB/T 20234.3-2023。除非雙標準設計或適配器經過專門驗證，否則 GB/T 交流和直流接口應視為不同於 IEC 62196 Type 2 或 CCS2 實施的接口系統。

gap.en: Prepare connector drawings, pinout, mating-cycle ratings, locking behavior, IP rating, temperature-rise evidence, cable ratings, and local vehicle compatibility evidence. For DC chargers, evaluate the connector gap separately from the communication-protocol gap.
gap.zh: 应准备接口图纸、针脚定义、插拔寿命、锁止行为、防护等级、温升证据、电缆额定值和当地车型兼容性证据。对于直流充电机，应将接口差距与通信协议差距分开评估。
gap.zht: 應準備接口圖紙、針腳定義、插拔壽命、鎖止行為、防護等級、溫升證據、電纜額定值和當地車型相容性證據。對於直流充電機，應將接口差距與通信協議差距分開評估。

mandatory_status.target: Project, interoperability, customer, or installation dependent unless a Colombia rule, tender, utility requirement, or operator specification expressly specifies the connector standard
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 is the common China-market connector baseline; mandatory status depends on Chinese product and project requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A GB/T 20234 connector can be a Colombia market-fit risk unless the project explicitly accepts it or the charger is redesigned and validated for the connector family expected at the site.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非项目明确接受，或充电桩已按现场预期接口族重新设计并验证，否则GB/T 20234接口可能构成哥伦比亚市场适配风险。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非項目明確接受，或充電樁已按現場預期接口族重新設計並驗證，否則GB/T 20234接口可能構成哥倫比亞市場適配風險。
